summary: Fix install-git-hooks.mjs SyntaxError by escaping bash ${...} expressions in template literals, remove opencode-beads plugin (missing bd CLI)

details.root_cause: Bash parameter expansions like ${#learning_update_files[@]} inside JavaScript template literals were misinterpreted by Node.js as JS private fields (#learning_update_files) or template expressions, causing SyntaxError during node scripts/install-git-hooks.mjs execution
details.fix: Escaped bash ${...} with \$ in template literals: \${#learning_update_files[@]} on line 75, \${learning_update_files[@]} on line 79, \$rel_file on line 80
details.secondary: Removed opencode-beads@0.6.0 from plugin lists in opencode.json and opencode-clean.json because external 'bd' CLI tool is not installed on this machine
